data.title: QHSLab’s Record Revenue Growth and First Profitable Year
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

USA Equities ( (USAQ) ) has provided an update.

On February 18, 2025, QHSLab, Inc. announced its unaudited financial results for the fourth quarter and fiscal year of 2024, revealing significant achievements including record revenue growth and positive net income. With a 98% revenue increase in Q4 2024 compared to the same quarter in 2023, the company marked its first profitable year, demonstrating strong financial momentum and resilience despite seasonal challenges. These results reflect the successful execution of strategic initiatives and operational efficiencies, reinforcing QHSLab’s commitment to sustainable profitability and long-term financial stability.

More about USA Equities

QHSLab, Inc. is a medical device company that provides digital healthcare solutions and point-of-care diagnostic tests to primary care physicians. Its services utilize advanced artificial intelligence algorithms to enhance patient monitoring and medical care, allowing for quick assessments and real-time data transfer between patients and doctors. The company aims to improve healthcare delivery and physician revenues through its innovative products and services.

YTD Price Performance: 4.09%

Current Market Cap: $2.97M

data.title: Coca-Cola HBC PDMRs Acquire Shares, Reinforcing Stakeholder Alignment
data.description:

  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

The latest update is out from Coca Cola HBC ( (GB:CCH) ).

Coca-Cola HBC AG announced that several persons discharging managerial responsibilities (PDMRs) have acquired shares in the company through its Employee Share Purchase Plan. The company also made matching contributions by purchasing additional shares on behalf of these individuals. This move signifies the company’s commitment to aligning the interests of its management with shareholders, potentially strengthening stakeholder confidence and enhancing corporate governance.

More about Coca Cola HBC

Coca-Cola HBC AG is a leading bottling company in the beverage industry, focusing on the production and distribution of non-alcoholic ready-to-drink beverages. It operates across multiple markets, delivering Coca-Cola products and other beverage brands.

data.title: Genprex Strengthens Diabetes Focus with New License
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

The latest update is out from Genprex ( (GNPX) ).

Genprex has entered into a new exclusive license agreement with the University of Pittsburgh, consolidating prior agreements to focus on diabetes gene therapy, targeting Type 1 and Type 2 diabetes. This move strengthens Genprex’s intellectual property portfolio and positions it to potentially disrupt the diabetes market, with the formation of a subsidiary, Convergen Biotech, Inc., to advance the diabetes program separately from its oncology focus.

More about Genprex

Genprex, Inc. is a clinical-stage gene therapy company focusing on developing therapies for cancer and diabetes. The company collaborates with world-class institutions to provide novel treatment approaches, including its innovative diabetes gene therapy that uses an AAV vector to deliver specific genes to the pancreas.

data.title: Cordlife Group Expects Loss for 2024 Amid Operational Challenges
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Cordlife Group ( (SG:P8A) ) has issued an announcement.

Cordlife Group Limited has issued a profit warning for the financial year ending 31 December 2024, anticipating a loss due to temporary suspension and conditional resumption of its operations in Singapore, as mandated by the Ministry of Health. Despite the renewal of its licences and full operational resumption from January 2025, the company faces uncertainty in its financial recovery and profitability for the year ending 2025.

More about Cordlife Group

Cordlife Group Limited, registered in Singapore, operates in the healthcare industry, focusing on cord blood and human tissue banking services. The company offers collection, processing, and storage services for cord blood and human tissues, with a key market presence in Singapore.

data.title: China Modern Dairy Expects Significant Net Loss Amid Strategic Adjustments
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

China Modern Dairy Holdings Ltd. ( (HK:1117) ) has provided an announcement.

China Modern Dairy Holdings Ltd. has announced a profit warning for the fiscal year ending December 31, 2024, anticipating a net loss between RMB1,350 million to RMB1,550 million, contrasting with the previous year’s net profit. Despite challenges such as decreased market prices for raw milk and strategic adjustments leading to non-cash losses, the company reports a strong cash EBITDA growth driven by improved farm management, cost control, and business integration efforts. The losses are attributed to non-cash items like fair value reassessment of dairy cows and goodwill impairment, which do not affect cash flow or ongoing operations.

More about China Modern Dairy Holdings Ltd.

China Modern Dairy Holdings Ltd., incorporated in the Cayman Islands, operates in the dairy industry. The company focuses on dairy farming and the production of raw milk, with a significant emphasis on quality farm management and sustainable growth. It has developed a robust dairy cow herd and has invested in large-scale organic raw milk farms to enhance its product offerings.

data.title: Dycom Appoints Jill L. Ramshaw as New HR Chief
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Dycom ( (DY) ) has provided an update.

On February 18, 2025, Dycom Industries, Inc. announced the appointment of Jill L. Ramshaw as Vice President and Chief Human Resources Officer effective February 17, 2025. With over 20 years of strategic human resources experience, Ramshaw will lead Dycom’s human capital strategy, enhancing talent acquisition, development, and performance management to meet industry demands. Her previous role was at Marathon Oil Corporation, where she was the Senior Vice President of Human Resources. This strategic appointment aims to strengthen Dycom’s workforce and reinforce its vision of being a key player in connecting America.

More about Dycom

Dycom Industries, Inc. is a leading provider of specialty contracting services to the telecommunications infrastructure and utility industries across the United States. The company’s services include program management, planning, engineering and design, aerial, underground, and wireless construction, maintenance, and fulfillment services for telecommunications providers, as well as underground facility locating services for various utilities, including telecommunications providers, and construction and maintenance services for electric and gas utilities.

data.title: Light & Wonder to Acquire Grover Gaming Assets
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

The latest update is out from Light & Wonder ( (LNW) ).

On February 17, 2025, Light & Wonder, Inc. announced a definitive agreement to acquire the charitable gaming assets of Grover Gaming, Inc. and G2 Gaming, Inc. for $850 million, with a potential earn-out of up to $200 million. This acquisition, expected to close in the second quarter of 2025, positions Light & Wonder as a leader in the fast-growing charitable gaming space, enhancing its cross-platform strategy and presenting new revenue opportunities by integrating Grover’s established customer base with its land-based gaming content.

More about Light & Wonder

Light & Wonder, Inc. is a leading cross-platform global games company that creates immersive content for players across various platforms. The company prides itself on delivering unforgettable experiences, leveraging the talents of over 6,000 team members, and maintaining a commitment to integrity and sustainable practices.

data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

The latest update is out from CRRC ( (HK:1766) ).

CRRC Corporation Limited announced the poll results of its 2025 first extraordinary general meeting held in Beijing, China. The meeting was attended by 4,051 shareholders and proxies, representing 56.9% of the company’s voting shares. The meeting complied with relevant laws and regulations, and resolutions were voted on through a combination of on-site and internet voting. The event signifies active shareholder engagement and adherence to corporate governance practices, impacting CRRC’s operational transparency and stakeholder confidence.

More about CRRC

CRRC Corporation Limited is a joint stock company incorporated in the People’s Republic of China, operating in the transportation equipment manufacturing industry. The company primarily focuses on the production of rolling stock, including locomotives and rail vehicles, serving both domestic and international markets.
